user_symptom: customers using Cognitive Services may have experienced difficulties connecting to resources. Impacted customers may have experienced timeouts or 401 authorization errors.
root_cause: a subset of cognitive services backend compute clusters were impacted during this incident, causing them to be unable to service customer requests. This issue was triggered by a pending (deployed, but awaiting reboot) OS security update which had introduced a networking change on the updated clusters.

user_symptom: customers using Cognitive Services may have experienced difficulties connecting to resources. Impacted customers may have experienced timeouts or 401 authorization errors.
root_cause: a pending (deployed, but awaiting reboot) OS security update which had introduced a networking change on the updated clusters. The networking update unintentionally caused a networking state which was not supported, and thus when the update was staged, the machines lost network connectivity and could no longer handle requests.
